world_contract.description: A realistic warehouse aisle where a humanoid robot carrying a cardboard box interacts with a human worker exhibiting unpredictable movements, captured from a static surveillance perspective.

locked_entities.appearance: A humanoid robot, 1.75 meters tall, with a matte white and dark grey composite chassis, exposed metallic silver joints at the shoulders, elbows, and knees, and a glowing circular blue LED status indicator on the center of its chest. It has a sleek, faceless head with a black glass visor.
locked_entities.material: matte composite plastic, brushed aluminum, and tempered glass

locked_entities.appearance: A male warehouse worker of medium build, wearing a bright neon yellow high-visibility safety vest over a long-sleeved navy blue shirt, dark grey rugged work pants, brown steel-toed boots, and a white industrial hard hat. No visible logos or branding.
locked_entities.material: fabric, polyester safety mesh, and hard plastic

locked_entities.appearance: A plain, medium-sized rectangular corrugated cardboard box, light brown in color, measuring 0.4m x 0.4m x 0.3m. The box is sealed along the top center seam with clear, slightly reflective packing tape. It has no text, labels, or barcodes.
locked_entities.material: corrugated cardboard and adhesive plastic tape
locked_entities.default_relation: held_by robot_01 at chest level with both hands

locked_environment.layout: A straight warehouse aisle, 3.2 meters wide, bordered on both sides by tall, industrial steel storage racks painted orange and blue. The racks are filled with wooden pallets holding various shrink-wrapped brown boxes.
locked_environment.floor: Polished, light grey industrial concrete floor with visible expansion joints and painted bright yellow safety boundary lines running parallel to the racks on both sides.
locked_environment.lighting: Even, bright overhead industrial fluorescent tube lighting fixtures, casting realistic, soft-edged shadows directly beneath the objects and actors.
locked_environment.style: Realistic, slightly grainy surveillance camera footage, static high-angle perspective, natural color grading, non-cinematic, authentic warehouse security feed aesthetic.

object_registry.surface_details: Fine panel gaps on the torso, subtle metallic sheen on the exposed joint actuators, circular blue light emission from the chest.
negative_drift: chassis turning glossy or metallic silver
LED ring changing color to red or green
robot growing wheels or tracks instead of legs

object_registry.surface_details: Fabric folds on the navy blue sleeves, mesh texture on the safety vest, reflective silver stripes on the vest.
negative_drift: vest changing to orange or red
hard hat disappearing or changing color

object_registry.surface_details: Subtle corrugated ridges visible under close inspection, single strip of clear tape reflecting overhead lights.
negative_drift: box morphing into a plastic crate
shipping labels or black text appearing on the box
box changing size or aspect ratio during the video

scene_registry.spatial_map: Aisle center line runs along the Y-axis. Racks are positioned at X = -1.6m and X = 1.6m. Robot starts at Y = 4.0m moving towards Y = 0.0m. Worker starts at X = 1.2m, Y = 2.0m.
negative_drift: racks changing color to green or grey
floor changing to wood or dark asphalt
addition of windows or natural daylight

reference_assets.description: The master layout image showing the empty warehouse aisle with correct lighting, rack placement, and floor markings.
Front view of the humanoid robot standing upright, showing the matte white panels and the blue chest LED.
Front view of the worker wearing the neon yellow vest and white hard hat.
Isometric view of the plain brown cardboard box showing the clear tape seam.
Initial frame for Scenario 1: Robot carrying the box down the center, worker standing near the right rack.

identity_checks.method: VLM color histogram and keypoint tracking on the robot chassis panels.
identity_checks.pass_condition: The chassis must maintain a matte white and dark grey color profile with a blue LED indicator across all frames, with no red or green drift.

identity_checks.method: Object detection bounding box tracking combined with color segmentation for neon yellow.
identity_checks.pass_condition: The worker must wear a neon yellow vest in 100% of the frames where they are visible.

identity_checks.method: Optical flow and geometry consistency check on the box boundaries.
identity_checks.pass_condition: The box must remain a rigid rectangular prism of constant scale while held by the robot.

identity_checks.method: Frame-to-frame structural similarity index (SSIM) on the background racks and floor.
identity_checks.pass_condition: SSIM of the background regions must exceed 0.95 across the entire video duration, confirming a static camera and environment.

consistency_requirements: The humanoid robot must maintain its matte white and grey chassis and blue LED ring.
The worker must wear the high-visibility neon yellow vest and white hard hat.
The warehouse aisle layout, rack positions, and concrete floor markings must remain identical across all variations.
The camera must remain completely static, simulating a fixed security camera.
